data.title: TRUMP wallet official website associated with X account is frozen again
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the relevant page information, the X account @TrumpWalletApp associated with the TRUMP wallet official website has been frozen again. 
Earlier news, the X account of the TRUMP wallet @TrumpWalletApp returned to normal after a short freeze. The information on the TRUMP wallet official website shows that the wallet was jointly developed by Magic Eden and TRUMP Meme. However, Donald Trump Jr., the eldest son of Trump, said that the Trump Group has no connection with this wallet product, and WLFI will launch an official wallet.

data.title: Cryptoquant analyst: The current bull market cycle may be deliberately extended, and will eventually usher in a bubble-like frenzy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptoquant analyst Crypto Dan wrote that the trend of this round of crypto market bull market cycle is significantly different from that of 2017 and 2021. Although there were also short-term pullbacks and rises in the early stage, since 2024, Bitcoin has repeatedly experienced strong pull-ups and rapid declines, accompanied by the general weakness of altcoins, and market sentiment has been frustrated.
He pointed out that this repetitive pattern of "rise-suppression" may be the market main force deliberately suppressing the overheated market to extend the overall cycle time. This phenomenon is relatively rare in previous bull markets, and may indicate that the current cycle will enter a bubble-like climax stage driven by emotions in the future.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Remains Stable Amid Economic Developments
data.description:
According to PANews, despite U.S. ADP employment and ISM data falling short of expectations, risk assets have remained stable. U.S. President Donald Trump criticized the Federal Reserve for not cutting interest rates promptly and proposed the permanent removal of the debt ceiling. The Treasury Secretary announced the "Big Beautiful Bill" plan, which aims to provide a 100% tax deduction for manufacturing and research centers. Congress is set to vote on the related bill on July 4.

JPMorgan Chase has approved cryptocurrency ETFs as collateral for loans in its retail, trading, and wealth management businesses, marking the first formal recognition of the net asset value of crypto assets. Publicly traded companies K Wave Media and Treasure Global have announced their allocation of crypto assets. Circle Internet Financial has filed for an IPO, with a valuation between $7.6 billion and $8.1 billion.

On June 4, spot BTC and ETH ETFs saw net inflows of $87 million and $57 million, respectively, indicating a slowdown compared to May but maintaining structural stability. ETH continues to test the 200-day moving average, and the ETH/BTC exchange rate remains strong at around 0.025. Demand for $130,000 BTC call options expiring in September has increased, reflecting heightened market expectations for surpassing previous highs.

data.title: Bluebird Mining Ventures to Implement Bitcoin Treasury Strategy
data.description: According to PANews, Bluebird Mining Ventures, a public gold mining company in the United Kingdom, has announced plans to adopt a Bitcoin treasury strategy. The company intends to convert the revenue from its future mining projects into Bitcoin, aligning with its strategic financial approach.

data.title: SMFG Invests in Hashed Venture Fund III to Boost Blockchain Innovation
data.description: According to PANews, Japan's Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group (SMFG) has strategically invested in Hashed Venture Fund III, a blockchain-focused venture capital fund managed by Hashed Ventures. The exact amount of the investment has not been disclosed. This move highlights SMFG's commitment to advancing blockchain technology and supporting innovative ventures in the sector.

data.title: Brazil's Central Bank to Use Drex Data for Interest Rate Decisions
data.description:
According to PANews, Henrique Videira, an executive at Brazil's central bank, announced at the Token Nation conference in São Paulo on June 4 that the bank will utilize transaction data from its digital currency, Drex, as a direct input for interest rate decisions. Each payment and asset transfer recorded on Drex's distributed ledger will generate timestamped structured entries, allowing the central bank to monitor changes in consumption, liquidity distribution, and industry performance in real-time through aggregated data. After internal desensitization, this data will be merged with wholesale settlement flows to create a policy dashboard tracking merchant category spending, collateral movement, and regional trade volumes. Videira emphasized that Drex only stores hashed personal identifiers and that policy decision-making authority remains with the monetary committee.

The Drex pilot program began in March 2025, with 16 institutions testing tokenized government bonds and deposit tokens. Full implementation awaits congressional approval of a proposal submitted last month.

data.title: Earn WalletConnect (WCT) Tokens by Learning on Binance — Limited-Time Quiz Event Starts June 5
data.description: Binance is launching a new round of its popular Learn & Earn program, offering KYC-verified users the chance to earn free WalletConnect (WCT) tokens by completing a short educational quiz. Learn Blockchain — Get Rewarded in WCTEvent Name: Learn & Earn: WalletConnect (WCT)Activity Period: June 5, 2025, 09:00 UTC – June 19, 2025, 09:00 UTCToken Reward: WCT tokens distributed to eligible usersEligibility: KYC-verified users only, first-come, first-served How to Participate:Read the Article & Watch the Video on WalletConnect.Pass the Quiz before the token supply runs out.Receive WCT Tokens directly into your Binance account (if qualified). Only one reward per user. Quiz must be completed while the reward pool lasts.About WalletConnect (WCT)WalletConnect is a Web3 communications protocol enabling secure connections between decentralized apps (dApps) and crypto wallets. The WCT token powers its decentralized network infrastructure.
